title: Colony runtime behavior lane precheck
delta_summary: added explicit FutureTimeoutError handling in ColonyRuntime.cancel_all_tasks()
timeout case downgraded to debug; generic failures keep warning with traceback

risk_signals.evidence: upstream uses single warning for timeout-or-failure path
risk_signals.impact: reduced signal quality for diagnosing colony cancellation behavior

decision_gate: prefer keep_local if runtime/overseer/tests stay green and diagnostics improve
